Title: Junior Administrator
Description:
Job Description

About Technip Energies

With approximately 15,000 employees, Technip Energies is one of the largest engineering and technology companies globally, with leadership positions in LNG, hydrogen and ethylene as well as growing market positions in sustainable chemistry and CO2 management.

About The Job

We are currently seeking a Junior Administrator to join our team in Houston, TX. This role will report directly to a Senior Administrator and provide day-to-day administrative support to multiple leaders across the organization.

This is an excellent opportunity for someone early in their career who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and eager to grow within a fast-paced, global environment. The Junior Administrator will be trained and mentored while supporting senior stakeholders and ensuring seamless coordination of administrative activities.

This role will also serve as backup support during periods of absence (PTO/vacation), ensuring consistent administrative coverage for key executives.

Key Responsibilities

Executive & Administrative Support


Provide administrative support to multiple leaders (including calendar, meeting coordination, and general administrative needs)
Manage complex calendars, including scheduling internal and external meetings across time zones
Support diary management, prioritizing meetings and ensuring efficient time utilization for executives
Assist with managing external stakeholders, customers, and appointments



Travel, Expenses & Logistics


Coordinate domestic and international travel arrangements (flights, accommodations, itineraries)
Prepare and submit expense reports in a timely and accurate manner
Support logistics for meetings, team events, and offsite activities



Presentation & Digital Support


Create, format, and enhance PowerPoint presentations and other materials for leadership
Utilize digital tools to improve organization, communication, and efficiency
Support document formatting and reporting using Microsoft Office Suite



Operational & Team Support


Maintain and update calendars, distribution lists, and team schedules
Support internal and external communications
Assist with tracking action items, reports, and administrative workflows
Maintain organized files, documents, and shared systems
Provide general administrative support to the broader team as needed



Coverage & Flexibility


Act as backup support for senior administrative functions during absences
Adapt to changing priorities and support multiple stakeholders effectively



About You

We’d love to hear from you if your profile meets the following requirements:

Minimum Qualifications


Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration or related field (or equivalent experience)
0–3 years of administrative or office support experience
Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook, PowerPoint)



Preferred Qualifications


Strong PowerPoint and presentation-building skills
Experience with calendar management and executive scheduling
Familiarity with travel coordination and expense reporting
Exposure to digital tools (Teams, SharePoint, or similar platforms)



Key Skills


Strong organizational and time management skills
High attention to detail and accuracy
Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Proactive mindset with a willingness to learn and grow
Ability to handle confidential information with discretion



What’s Next?

Once receiving your application, a recruiter performs an initial check between your skills and qualifications with our stated requirements prior to a detailed and focused review by the hiring manager. We expect to take up to a few weeks to perform that review. You will hear from us, if we feel your skills and experience are a match, and we want to organize interviews and meet you physically or virtually depending upon the location. To have an overview of the recruitment process, please visit our dedicated webpage here

We invite you to get to know more about our company by visiting www.technipenergies.com and follow us on LinkedIn , Instagram for company updates.

Title: AI Strategist
Description:
Role: AI Strategist

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-time




Compensation: Competitive salary commensurate with experience, qualifications, and location. Indicative range: $120,000 – $175,000 (USD equivalent), plus benefits.




Role Overview

We are hiring an AI Strategist to translate AI capabilities into business strategy. The role bridges executive vision and technical reality — finding the use cases that matter and shaping the path to deliver them.




Key Responsibilities

- Define AI strategy and roadmap aligned to business priorities

- Identify and prioritise AI use cases across functions

- Build business cases for AI investments and track value delivered

- Advise leadership on emerging AI capabilities and competitive moves

- Partner with engineering, product, and data on implementation paths

- Develop AI governance frameworks and risk approaches




Required Skills and Qualifications

- 5+ years in strategy, consulting, or AI/ML product roles

- Strong understanding of modern AI capabilities and limitations

- Excellent written and verbal communication with executive presence

- Experience shaping strategic narratives for boards and senior leaders

- Comfort working across business and technical contexts

- MBA or advanced degree preferred




What You'll Bring

- Sharp analytical thinking and the ability to structure ambiguity

- Strong written and verbal communication, including executive-ready outputs

- Bias toward action and the ability to drive recommendations to outcomes

- Comfort working asynchronously across time zones




What We Offer

- Fully remote, flexible work hours

- Performance-based bonus structure

- Annual learning & development stipend

- Health and wellness benefits (varies by location)

- Opportunity to work on high-scale, real-world impact projects




Equal Opportunity Statement

This is an equal opportunity role. Applications are welcomed from all qualified individuals regardless of race, color, ethnicity, nationality, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, religion, disability, marital status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. All hiring decisions are based solely on qualifications, skills, and demonstrated ability.

Title: AI/ML Engineer
Description:
About The Company

Air Apps is a pioneering technology company founded by a dedicated family team with a mission to revolutionize resource planning through artificial intelligence. Established in Lisbon, Portugal in 2018, the company has expanded its presence with offices in Lisbon and San Francisco, maintaining a self-funded status while achieving over 100 million downloads worldwide. Air Apps is committed to challenging conventional approaches and pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that genuinely impact users' lives. Our focus is on creating innovative products that empower individuals and entrepreneurs to optimize their planning, work, and lifestyle. As a forward-thinking organization, we foster a culture of creativity, collaboration, and continuous innovation, aiming to redefine the future of resource management globally.

About The Role

We are seeking a skilled AI/ML Engineer to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing, developing, and fine-tuning machine learning models that power our mobile applications. Your work will directly influence the development of intelligent features that enhance user engagement and deliver seamless experiences. Collaborating closely with product managers, engineers, and designers, you will leverage your expertise in artificial intelligence and deep learning to drive innovation and maintain our competitive edge in the mobile app industry. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to cutting-edge AI solutions in a fast-paced, remote-friendly environment, helping us to shape the future of resource planning technology.

Qualifications


Minimum of 3+ years of experience in AI/ML development, preferably within mobile applications.
Proficiency in Python and experience with machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow and PyTorch.
Strong knowledge of deep learning, natural language processing (NLP), computer vision, and statistical modeling.
Experience working with cloud-based ML services including AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure.
Solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and software engineering best practices.
Experience in deploying, maintaining, and monitoring ML models in production environments.
Excellent collaboration skills and ability to work effectively in remote, cross-functional teams.
Strong problem-solving skills with a passion for innovation and continuous learning.


Responsibilities


Develop, train, and optimize machine learning models to support various features within our mobile applications.
Research and implement state-of-the-art AI techniques to enhance user engagement and overall app performance.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to seamlessly integrate AI-driven solutions into product development.
Design, build, and maintain scalable ML pipelines ensuring efficient deployment and real-time monitoring.
Analyze large datasets to extract actionable insights that inform product enhancements and strategic decisions.
Stay abreast of emerging trends and advancements in AI and incorporate best practices into development workflows.
Optimize AI models specifically for mobile environments to ensure high performance, low latency, and resource efficiency.


Benefits


Access to Apple hardware ecosystem for work purposes.
Annual performance-based bonus.
Comprehensive medical insurance, including vision and dental coverage.
Disability insurance covering short-term and long-term needs.
401(k) plan with up to 4% company contribution.
Opportunities to attend Air Conference for team collaboration and professional growth.
Transportation allowance to support commuting needs.
Complimentary meals available at the company hub.
Gym membership to promote health and wellness.


Diversity & Inclusion

At Air Apps, we are dedicated to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable work environment. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives, believing that diversity enriches our innovation and strengthens our team. We celebrate inclusivity and are committed to creating a workplace where everyone feels valued and empowered to contribute their unique talents.

Application Disclaimer

We value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants are expected to submit original work without AI assistance. The use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification. We encourage genuine engagement and look forward to discovering passionate candidates eager to make a difference with us.

Your work will directly influence the development of intelligent features that enhance user engagement and deliver seamless experiences. Collaborating closely with product managers, engineers, and designers, you will leverage your expertise in artificial intelligence and deep learning to drive innovation and maintain our competitive edge in the mobile app industry. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to cutting-edge AI solutions in a fast-paced, remote-friendly environment, helping us to shape the future of resource planning technology.

Qualifications

  • Minimum of 3+ years of experience in AI/ML development, preferably within mobile applications.
  • Proficiency in Python and experience with machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow and PyTorch.
  • Strong knowledge of deep learning, natural language processing (NLP), computer vision, and statistical modeling.
  • Experience working with cloud-based ML services including AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure.
  • Solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and software engineering best practices.
  • Experience in deploying, maintaining, and monitoring ML models in production environments.
  • Excellent collaboration skills and ability to work effectively in remote, cross-functional teams.
  • Strong problem-solving skills with a passion for innovation and continuous learning.

Responsibilities

  • Develop, train, and optimize machine learning models to support various features within our mobile applications.
  • Research and implement state-of-the-art AI techniques to enhance user engagement and overall app performance.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to seamlessly integrate AI-driven solutions into product development.
  • Design, build, and maintain scalable ML pipelines ensuring efficient deployment and real-time monitoring.
  • Analyze large datasets to extract actionable insights that inform product enhancements and strategic decisions.
  • Stay abreast of emerging trends and advancements in AI and incorporate best practices into development workflows.
  • Optimize AI models specifically for mobile environments to ensure high performance, low latency, and resource efficiency.

Benefits

  • Access to Apple hardware ecosystem for work purposes.
  • Annual performance-based bonus.
  • Comprehensive medical insurance, including vision and dental coverage.
  • Disability insurance covering short-term and long-term needs.
  • 401(k) plan with up to 4% company contribution.
  • Opportunities to attend Air Conference for team collaboration and professional growth.
  • Transportation allowance to support commuting needs.
  • Complimentary meals available at the company hub.
  • Gym membership to promote health and wellness.

Diversity & Inclusion

At Air Apps, we are dedicated to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable work environment. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives, believing that diversity enriches our innovation and strengthens our team. We celebrate inclusivity and are committed to creating a workplace where everyone feels valued and empowered to contribute their unique talents.

Application Disclaimer

We value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants are expected to submit original work without AI assistance. The use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification. We encourage genuine engagement and look forward to discovering passionate candidates eager to make a difference with us.

Title: Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
About The Company

Artera is an innovative AI startup dedicated to revolutionizing cancer treatment through the development of advanced medical artificial intelligence tests. Our mission is to personalize therapy options for cancer patients by leveraging cutting-edge AI models and data-driven insights. By focusing on creating scalable and efficient AI solutions, Artera aims to empower physicians and improve patient outcomes on a global scale. Our team comprises passionate professionals committed to transforming healthcare through technology, fostering an environment of continuous innovation and excellence.

About The Role

We are seeking a highly skilled Machine Learning Engineer to join our AI Platform team. In this role, you will be instrumental in establishing and maintaining scalable, efficient data processing pipelines and model training infrastructures. Your work will directly impact our ability to develop, deploy, and optimize large-scale AI models that analyze digital pathology data for personalized cancer therapy. You will collaborate closely with AI model developers, platform engineers, and cross-functional teams to ensure that our AI systems operate at peak performance. Your expertise will help Artera scale its AI capabilities, enhance model training workflows, and improve overall system efficiency, supporting our mission to deliver innovative healthcare solutions worldwide.

Qualifications


8+ years of industry software engineering experience
4+ years of experience with ML orchestration frameworks such as Flyte, Ray, Kubeflow, Metaflow, MLFlow, Dagster, Argo Workflow, or Prefect
4+ years of experience using PyTorch, TensorFlow, or JAX in Python
3+ years of experience working with AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes
1+ years of experience optimizing large-scale, high data-throughput distributed machine learning training pipelines
Proficiency with cloud infrastructure and containerization technologies
Strong understanding of GPU/CPU optimization techniques
Experience with data storage and serving large datasets, particularly in digital pathology
Familiarity with inference optimization tools such as TorchScript, ONNXRuntime, DeepSpeed, AWS Neuron, or similar
Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment


Responsibilities


Develop the long-term vision and strategic roadmap for Artera’s AI platform to support scaling in inference volume and development workloads
Manage and scale Artera’s ML compute infrastructure, including distributed training systems and developer libraries
Build and evolve core libraries enabling AI scientists to develop, deploy, and monitor AI models efficiently
Collaborate with model developers to optimize GPU and CPU utilization, data throughput, and training efficiency for large foundation models
Enhance data storage and retrieval systems to handle terabytes of digital pathology data effectively for large-scale training
Implement and improve observability infrastructure to monitor performance and identify areas for optimization across AI models
Ensure infrastructure supports multi-node and multi-GPU training workflows and deployment pipelines
Stay updated with emerging AI infrastructure tools and techniques, integrating them into Artera’s platform as appropriate


Benefits


Competitive salary ranging from $180,000 to $220,000 annually
Equity participation as a core component of compensation
401(k) matching program
Unlimited paid time off (PTO)
Remote work flexibility, open to candidates authorized to work in the US or Canada
Opportunities for professional growth and development in a pioneering healthcare AI environment
Collaborative and innovative work culture focused on impact and excellence


Equal Opportunity

At Artera, we are committed to fostering an inclusive environment that values diversity and equal opportunity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex (including pregnancy), physical or mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, marital status, protected veteran status, or any other legally protected characteristic. We believe that diverse perspectives drive innovation and are essential to our mission of transforming healthcare through AI.

Title: Machine learning Engineer
Description:
About The Company

Capital One is a leading diversified financial services company known for its innovative approach to banking and credit services. With a focus on leveraging technology to improve customer experience and operational efficiency, Capital One has established itself as a pioneer in digital banking solutions. The company operates across various segments, including credit cards, auto loans, and savings accounts, serving millions of customers nationwide. Committed to fostering a culture of innovation, diversity, and inclusion, Capital One continually invests in cutting-edge technology and talent to stay ahead in the competitive financial landscape.

About The Role

The Lead Machine Learning Engineer at Capital One plays a crucial role in transforming data-driven insights into scalable, production-ready machine learning systems. As part of an Agile team, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and deploying advanced machine learning models and applications that address complex business challenges. Your expertise will guide architecture decisions, optimize model performance, and ensure high availability and security of ML solutions. This role offers an exciting opportunity to work with emerging technologies, cloud platforms, and cross-functional teams to deliver innovative solutions that impact millions of customers. You will lead efforts in building robust data pipelines, automating deployment processes, and establishing best practices for responsible AI, all while mentoring junior engineers and collaborating with product and data science teams.

Qualifications

To qualify for this role, candidates should possess a bachelor’s degree in computer science, electrical engineering, mathematics, or a related field, along with at least six years of experience in designing and building data-intensive solutions using distributed computing frameworks. A minimum of four years of programming experience in languages such as Python, Scala, or Java is required, along with at least two years of experience in developing, scaling, and optimizing machine learning systems. Preferred candidates will have a master's or doctoral degree, extensive experience with industry-recognized ML frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, or Spark, and a proven track record of deploying ML solutions in cloud environments like AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform. Strong knowledge of data pipeline construction, model retraining, monitoring, and governance, as well as leadership experience, are highly desirable.

Responsibilities


Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models and components in collaboration with product and data science teams to solve real-world business problems.
Make informed decisions regarding ML infrastructure based on understanding of modeling techniques, data quality, feature selection, hyperparameter tuning, and validation processes.
Write, test, and optimize application code to automate model training, testing, deployment, and retraining processes, ensuring resilience and scalability.
Collaborate within cross-functional Agile teams to create software solutions that support big data and ML applications, fostering a culture of continuous improvement.
Monitor, maintain, and retrain models in production environments to ensure their ongoing accuracy and relevance.
Leverage cloud-based architectures and technologies to deliver scalable ML solutions, constructing and managing data pipelines that feed models efficiently.
Implement CI/CD pipelines, automate testing, and monitor system performance to facilitate seamless deployment and updates of ML applications.
Ensure all code adheres to security standards, models are governed appropriately, and AI practices follow responsible and explainable AI principles.
Utilize programming languages such as Python, Scala, or Java to develop robust, maintainable, and high-performance solutions.


Benefits

Capital One offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support your overall well-being and professional growth. Employees are eligible for competitive health insurance plans, including medical, dental, and vision coverage. The company also provides financial benefits such as retirement plans, stock options, and performance-based incentives. Additional perks include paid time off, flexible work arrangements, professional development programs, and access to wellness resources. Capital One fosters an inclusive environment that values diversity and encourages innovation, ensuring employees have the tools and support needed to succeed and grow within the organization.

Equal Opportunity

Capital One is an equal opportunity employer committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic under applicable law. We actively promote a culture of respect and inclusion, ensuring all employees and applicants are treated fairly and with dignity. We also consider qualified applicants with criminal histories in accordance with relevant laws and regulations. Capital One values the unique perspectives and experiences each individual brings, fostering an environment where everyone can thrive and contribute to our collective success.

Title: Crew Member
Description:
CULTIVATE A BETTER WORLD

Food served fast does not have to be a typical fast-food experience. Chipotle has always done things differently, both in and out of our restaurants. We are changing the face of fast food, starting conversations, and directly supporting efforts to shift the future of farming and food. We hope you will join us as we continue to learn, evolve, and shape what comes next on our mission to make better food accessible to everyone.

THE OPPORTUNITY

At Chipotle, we’ve created a better place to eat and work. Many employees start just expecting a paycheck but end up with a rewarding career. We provide exceptional training and a clear career path – over 80% of our managers were promoted from Crew. We prepare real food by hand every day in our restaurants. No freezers, microwaves or can openers to be found. We’ll provide the training you need to feel confident working at any station – grill, cashier, prep, salsa and expo. We take pride in our exceptional customer service and it’s up to each of our team members to create the friendly atmosphere that our customers expect and enjoy. So, whether you have experience as a dishwasher, cashier, server, host, bartender, cook, prep cook or no experience at all, we’re always looking for passionate and enthusiastic people to join our team. If this sounds like something you’d like to be a part of, we’d love to meet you! See more details below and apply today. 

What’s In It For You


Tuition assistance (100% coverage for select degrees or up to $5,250/year)
Free food (yes, really FREE)
Medical, dental, and vision insurance
Digital Tips
Paid time off
Holiday closures
Competitive compensation
Full and part-time opportunities
Opportunities for advancement (80% of managers started as Crew)



What You’ll Bring To The Table


A friendly, enthusiastic attitude
Passion for helping and serving others (both customers and team members)
Desire to learn how to cook (a lot)
Be at least 16 years old
Ability to communicate in the primary language(s) of the work location



PAY TRANSPARENCY

Below is the base pay range for this position, which is also eligible for digital tips. Actual base pay may vary depending on skill level, experience and/or education. In addition to base pay, Chipotle offers a competitive benefits package. Visit https://jobs.chipotle.com/benefits for more details.

$20.00–21.00

Who We Are

Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. (NYSE: CMG) is cultivating a better world by serving responsibly sourced, classically cooked, real food with wholesome ingredients without artificial colors, flavors or preservatives. Chipotle has restaurants in the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, France and Germany and is the only restaurant company of its size that owns and operates all its restaurants in North America and Europe. With employees passionate about providing a great guest experience, Chipotle is a longtime leader and innovator in the food industry. Chipotle is committed to making its food more accessible to everyone while continuing to be a brand with a demonstrated purpose as it leads the way in digital, technology and sustainable business practices. For more information or to place an order online, visit www.chipotle.com.

Chipotle Mexican Grill is an equal opportunity employer that values diversity at all levels. As a people-first company rooted in values, our purpose extends beyond serving nutritious food using real ingredients. It means hiring world-class individuals and fostering a culture that champions diversity, ensures equity, and celebrates inclusion. All qualified applicants, regardless of personal characteristics, are encouraged to apply.

Qualified applicants with disabilities may be entitled to reasonable accommodation under the terms of the Americans with Disabilities Act and/or certain state or local laws. Please contact ADAaccommodations@chipotle.com if you need an accommodation due to a disability to complete an application, job interview, and/or to otherwise participate in the hiring process. This email does not respond to non-accommodations related requests.

Title: Senior Data Scientist
Description:
Payrate: $43.50 - $47.50/hr.
 
Responsibilities:
Design, build, and validate robust predictive models and machine learning solutions to address specific business problems.
Process, cleansing, and transforming large, complex datasets from various sources to create high‑quality features for modeling.
Create comprehensive documentation for all models, code, and data pipelines to ensure transparency and facilitate a smooth handover at the end of the contract.
Develop and present findings, model performance metrics, and project outcomes to technical leads and project managers, often through dashboards in tools like Power BI.
 
Technical Skills:
Strong foundation in machine learning, deep learning, and AI frameworks.
Familiarity with tools and platforms such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, Databricks, Google BigQuery, and cloud‑based AI services (AWS, Google Cloud, Azure).
Expert‑level proficiency in Python and its core data science libraries (e.g., pandas, NumPy, scikit‑learn).
Strong SQL skills for complex data extraction (mandatory).
Understanding of MLOps practices and tools (e.g., MLflow, Kubeflow) to ensure operational efficiency in AI pipelines.
Strong knowledge of data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model evaluation techniques.
Familiarity with data visualization tools such as Power BI or similar.
Strong interpersonal and communication skills to effectively translate technical concepts for non‑technical stakeholders.
 
Education/Experience:
Bachelor’s or advanced degree (Master’s/Ph.D.) in Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field.
5+ years with a strong background in statistics, machine learning, deep learning, and programming.
Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer
AWS Certified Machine Learning - Specialty
Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer Associate
 
Pay Transparency: The typical base pay for this role across the U.S. is: $43.50 - $47.50 /hour. Non-exempt positions are eligible for overtime at a rate of 1.5 times the base hourly rate for all hours worked in excess of 40 in a work week, or as required by state or local law. Final offer amounts, within the base pay set forth above, are determined by factors including your relevant skills, education and experience. Full-time employees are eligible to select from different benefits packages. Packages may include medical, denmatch, lifeion benefits, health savings accounts with qualified medical plan enrollment, 10 paid days off, 3 days paid bereavement leave, 401(k) plan participation with employer match,  life and disability insurance, commuter benefits, dependent care flexible spending account, accident insurance, critical illness insurance, hospital indemnity insurance, accommodations and reimbursement for work travel, and discretionary performance or recognition bonus. Sick leave and mobile phone reimbursement provided based on state or local law. 
 
Consent to Communication and Use of AI Technology: By submitting your application for this position and providing your email address(es) and/or phone number(s), you consent to receive text (SMS), email, and/or voice communication whether automated (including auto telephone dialing systems or automatic text messaging systems), pre-recorded, AI-assisted, or individually initiated from Aditi Consulting, our agents, representatives, or affiliates at the phone number and/or email address you have provided. These communications may include information about potential opportunities and information. Message and data rates may apply. Message frequency may vary.
You represent and warrant that the email address(es) and/or telephone number(s) you provided to us belong to you and that you are permitted to receive calls, text (SMS) messages, and/or emails at these contacts. You also acknowledge and agree to Aditi Consulting LLC’s use of AI technology during the sourcing process, including calls from an AI Voice Recruiter.
